title: Can I use a hardware token for 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication)
excerpt: I would like users to use this 2FA device to login. It is made by Duo and is a secure key. Does anyone know how to configure this?

posts.author: ComOps (Robert Levine)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like users to use this 2FA device to login. It is made by Duo and is a secure key. Does anyone know how to configure this?

image1920×556 49.1 KB

posts.author: Tyler (Tyler Lentz)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently the only 2FA methods available are using an authenticator app on your mobile device or SMS 2FA.
